text:
Sterling Ruby born American force base Bitburg, Germany 1972, lives works Angeles.
Public collections include Solomon Guggenheim Museum, York; Whitney Museum American Art, York; Museum Contemporary Art, Chicago; Museum Contemporary Art, North Miami; Museum Contemporary Art, Angeles; Angeles County Museum Art; Museum Modern Art, York; Francisco Museum Modern Art; Montreal Museum Fine Arts; Moderna Museet, Stockholm; Centre Georges Pompidou, Paris; Tate Modern, London.
Solo exhibitions include "CHRON," Drawing Center, York (2008); "SUPERMAX 2008," Museum Contemporary Art, Angeles (2008); "Grid Ripper," Galleria d'Arte Moderna Contemporanea, Bergamo, Italy (2008-09); "SOFT WORK," Centre D'Art Contemporain, Geneva (2012, traveled FRAC Champagne-Ardenne, Reims, France; Bonniers Konsthall, Stockholm; Museo d'Arte Contemporanea, Rome); "CHRON II," Fondazione MEMMO, Rome (2013, traveled Kunsthalle Mainz, Germany); "Droppa Blocka," Museum Dhondt-Dhaenens, Ghent, Belgium (2013); "Sterling Ruby," Baltimore Museum (2014).
Ruby's work included 2014 Whitney Biennial.
Ruby will featured "The Angeles Project" Ullens Center Contemporary Art, Beijing (2014); "Taipei Biennial 2014" Taipei Fine Arts Museum (2014); "Gwangju Biennale 2014: Burning Down House," Gwangju (2014).
